task: Perform an auditable attribution-stability analysis for a credit-risk model release using only the provided embedded packet. Compute all derived fields, classify each record against the provided threshold(s), rank governing risks using the provided priority formula, evaluate remediation options within the embedded budget (options may be combined only if summed cost <= remediation_budget_usd), recommend the smallest sufficient action, and flag for expert review if any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity perturbation. Deliverables: attribution_stability_report.xlsx and release_gate.md containing reproducible formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table. Do not use external data or hidden inputs; mark unresolved ambiguities as needs_review.
